title: Web server must use TLS 1.2 or higher
description: All HTTPS endpoints must negotiate TLS 1.2 or 1.3. Older protocols are deprecated and exploitable.
fix: Disable SSLv2/3, TLSv1.0, TLSv1.1 in the web server configuration. Configure only TLSv1.2 and TLSv1.3 cipher suites.

title: HTTP Strict-Transport-Security header must be set
description: Browsers must be instructed to refuse downgrade to HTTP for the duration of the HSTS policy.

title: X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors must be set
fix: Set X-Frame-Options: DENY (or SAMEORIGIN), or Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'none'.

title: Cookies marked Secure / HttpOnly / SameSite
description: Session cookies must include Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite attributes.
check: Inspect Set-Cookie headers on all auth-bearing responses.
fix: Set: Set-Cookie: id=...; Secure; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax

title: Server tokens / x-powered-by must be suppressed
description: Suppress version disclosure to reduce targeted exploitation.
fix: Set ServerTokens Prod / disable X-Powered-By in language framework.

title: SSH must disable password authentication
fix: Set PasswordAuthentication no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config and reload sshd.

title: Root login over SSH must be disabled
SMB signing must be required
description: Mitigate NTLM relay (PetitPotam, Coercer) by requiring SMB signing.

title: LLMNR / NetBIOS-NS must be disabled
fix: Disable via GPO: Computer Configuration → Administrative Templates → Network → DNS Client → Turn Off Multicast Name Resolution = Enabled.

title: S3 buckets must block public access
description: Apply Block Public Access at account and bucket level.

title: IMDSv2 required on EC2
fix: aws ec2 modify-instance-metadata-options --instance-id i-... --http-tokens required --http-endpoint enabled

title: ms-DS-MachineAccountQuota should be 0
description: Default 10 lets any authenticated user join machines and abuse RBCD.
